allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''Screenshot data length: {len\(d[""result""]\)}''\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''Stats API: {len\(d\)} keys, totalCount={d.get\(""totalCount"", ""N/A""\)}''\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''Options API \(org\): {len\(d.get\(""options"", d\)\)} options''\)")
